name: Leap of Fate
overview: The story of Phumwaree Phannaphirom, the daughter of a renowned billionaire whose notorious reputation and escapades are the talk of the town, and Nuan Nuethong, a woman blessed with exceptional beauty but cursed by misfortune. They represent two polar opposites, two life paths that should never have been able to cross.

trailers.title: วิหคหลงลม [Official Teaser]
